headline: SessionStart payload cap guardrails — truncation detector + cap validator

bullets: New `detect-session-start-truncation.sh` — UserPromptSubmit hook that fires once per session to check whether SessionStart output was truncated by the harness ~10KB cap. Warns model when essential docs may be incomplete.
New `validate-session-start-cap.sh` — fails `make validate` if session-start output exceeds 10KB (warns at 9.5KB). Added to `validate-all.sh` orchestrator.
Both settings templates now include a `UserPromptSubmit` hook entry for the truncation detector.
